questions_answered: Node 24.16.0 with pnpm 10.33.4 completes the workspace build and exact test command locally.
The command does not retain its local process group after successful completion.
The repository permits four concurrent workspace tests and default per-package Vitest worker/file concurrency.

Whether a clean-commit two-core memory-constrained replay reproduces the hang.

risk_implications: Node-version-only changes would be speculative and unsupported.
Nested workspace and Vitest concurrency can oversubscribe a smaller runner, but current evidence does not prove causation.
The live release remains blocked and lacks an explicit short timeout or retained-process diagnostics.
